name: Bolton
tagline: Historic Craftsman streets with the Willamette at the foot of the hill.
narrative: Bolton sits on the hillside just above the Willamette River, one of West Linn's oldest and most characterful pockets. The streets are lined with Craftsman bungalows and early cottages, many on generous lots with mature trees, and a short walk often leads to a river view or a tucked-away staircase down toward the water.

It rewards buyers who want personality over polish. Some homes are beautifully kept, others are honest fixers waiting for the right hands, and the range of prices reflects that spread. If you are buying your first home in West Linn, or you want a project with good bones in a walkable historic setting, Bolton is usually the first neighborhood worth a serious look.
rightFor: First-time buyers who want into West Linn schools without a luxury price tag
Renovators looking for character homes with room to add value
Buyers who value walkability and river access over square footage

name: Stafford
